name: Active Scanning
description: Adversaries probe victim infrastructure via active means.

name: Gather Victim Host Information
description: Information about hosts that may be used in targeting.

name: Gather Victim Identity Information
description: Identity-related data such as employee names, email addresses.

name: Gather Victim Network Information
description: Network topology, IP ranges, DNS, security appliances.

name: Search Open Technical Databases
description: Free/paid databases like WHOIS, certs, scan databases.

name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: Adversary attempts to take advantage of a weakness in an internet-facing application.

name: External Remote Services
description: Use remote services such as VPN/Citrix to gain initial access.

name: Valid Accounts
description: Use of credentials to access remote systems.

name: Phishing
description: Spearphishing link/attachment/service to gain access.

name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
description: Abuse command/scripting interpreters to execute code.

name: PowerShell
description: Abuse PowerShell to execute commands and scripts.

name: Unix Shell
description: Abuse bash/sh to execute commands.

name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution
description: Configure system settings to auto-execute on boot/logon.

name: Account Manipulation
description: Modify accounts to maintain access.

name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
description: Exploit a vulnerability to elevate privileges.

name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
description: Bypass UAC, sudo, setuid, etc.

name: OS Credential Dumping
description: Extract account credentials from OS or memory.

name: LSASS Memory
description: Dump credentials from LSASS process memory.

name: DCSync
description: Replicate password data from a DC via DCSync.

name: Brute Force
description: Systematic guessing of passwords.

name: Password Spraying
description: Try common passwords against many accounts.

name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets
description: Forge or steal Kerberos tickets (Kerberoasting, AS-REP roasting, golden tickets).

name: Kerberoasting
description: Request and crack TGS-REP for SPNs.

name: AS-REP Roasting
description: Request AS-REP for accounts with pre-auth disabled.

name: Network Service Discovery
description: Enumerate services on remote hosts (port scan).

name: Remote System Discovery
description: Enumerate other systems by hostname/IP.

name: Account Discovery
description: List accounts on local/domain systems.

name: Permission Groups Discovery
description: Enumerate groups and group memberships.

name: Remote Services
description: Use of legitimate remote services to move laterally.

name: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
description: Access shares to spread.

name: Windows Remote Management
description: Use WinRM to execute remotely.

name: Use Alternate Authentication Material
description: Pass-the-hash, pass-the-ticket, etc.

name: Data from Cloud Storage
description: Access cloud storage objects (S3, Azure Blob, GCS).

name: Data from Information Repositories
description: Mine wikis, code repos, ticketing for data.

name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
description: Use legitimate web services to exfil data.

name: Data Destruction
description: Destroy data on systems.

name: Data Encrypted for Impact
description: Ransomware-style encryption.

name: Resource Hijacking
description: Use resources for cryptomining etc.

name: Endpoint Denial of Service
description: DoS endpoints / services.

name: Account Access Removal
description: Lock out / delete accounts.

name: Browser Session Hijacking
description: Hijack a user's browser session (XSS, MitB).

name: Steal Web Session Cookie
description: Extract cookies to impersonate users.

name: Modify Authentication Process
description: Tamper with auth flows (MFA bypass, SSO abuse).

name: Hijack Execution Flow
description: DLL search order, path interception, COM hijacking.

name: Escape to Host
description: Container/VM escape to host.

name: SQL Injection
description: Manipulate database queries via untrusted input.

name: JavaScript
description: Cross-site scripting and other JS execution.

name: Web Shell
description: Drop a web shell for backdoor access.

name: Application Layer Protocol
description: Use HTTP/S, DNS, SMTP for C2.

name: Data from Configuration Repository
description: Mine configuration management systems / IaC.

name: Exploitation for Credential Access
description: Exploit a software vulnerability to obtain credentials.

name: File and Directory Discovery
description: Enumerate files and directories.

name: Process Discovery
description: List running processes.

name: Software Discovery
description: Enumerate installed software/security tools.

name: Domain Account Discovery
description: Enumerate AD accounts via LDAP/SAMR.

name: Domain Trust Discovery
description: Enumerate AD domain trusts.

name: Domain Policy Modification
description: Modify GPOs/Trusts to escalate or evade.

name: Steal or Forge Authentication Certificates
description: Abuse ADCS or other PKI to forge auth certs.

name: Forced Authentication
description: Coerce auth (NTLM relay, PetitPotam, Coercer).

name: Impair Defenses
description: Disable EDR/AV/logging.

name: Cloud Accounts
description: Abuse cloud-native accounts/SSO/IAM.

name: Unsecured Credentials
description: Find creds in code, config, env vars, history files.

name: Credentials In Files
description: Hard-coded creds in source/config.
